title: 7 Best Campaign Monitor Alternatives in 2025 (Free & Paid)
meta_description: Find the best Campaign Monitor alternatives. Compare email marketing tools with multi-brand support, automation, and analytics.
intro: While Campaign Monitor excels at multi-brand management and beautiful email design, you might be looking for alternatives that offer better pricing, more advanced features, or a free tier to get started. Whether you need stronger automation, e-commerce integration, or lower costs, there are several powerful email marketing platforms worth considering.
why_switch: Access to free tiers with up to 2,500 free subscribers on some platforms
More advanced automation and CRM features at competitive price points
Better integration options for e-commerce, webinars, and multi-channel marketing

alternatives.name: MailerLite
alternatives.tagline: Simple email marketing for small businesses
alternatives.best_for: Small businesses and freelancers on a budget
alternatives.key_difference: MailerLite offers a more affordable entry point at just $9/month with a generous free tier supporting 1,000 subscribers, making it ideal if you're looking to reduce costs without sacrificing core email marketing features. It combines an intuitive drag-drop editor with solid automation and landing pages at a fraction of Campaign Monitor's price.

alternatives.name: Beehiiv
alternatives.tagline: The newsletter platform built for growth
alternatives.key_difference: Beehiiv specializes in newsletter growth with built-in monetization, ad networks, and referral programs—features Campaign Monitor doesn't offer. If you're focused on scaling a paid newsletter or media business, Beehiiv's creator-centric features and excellent Trustpilot rating (4.4) make it the superior choice.

alternatives.name: ActiveCampaign
alternatives.best_for: Businesses needing advanced automation and CRM
alternatives.key_difference: ActiveCampaign goes beyond email with built-in CRM, advanced automation workflows, lead scoring, and site tracking in a single platform. For teams managing complex customer journeys and sales processes, it's a more comprehensive alternative than Campaign Monitor's email-focused approach.

alternatives.name: ConvertKit
alternatives.key_difference: ConvertKit is purpose-built for creators with visual automations, subscriber tagging, and integrated landing pages and commerce features. If you're selling courses, digital products, or building a creator business, ConvertKit's specialized features are better tailored than Campaign Monitor's agency-focused tools.

alternatives.name: Brevo
alternatives.key_difference: Brevo offers an exceptionally generous free tier with 100,000 free subscribers plus multi-channel capabilities including SMS, WhatsApp, and live chat. For businesses needing transactional email alongside marketing campaigns across multiple channels, Brevo provides significantly more value than Campaign Monitor.

alternatives.name: Klaviyo
alternatives.tagline: The platform for intelligent marketing automation
alternatives.best_for: E-commerce brands on Shopify or WooCommerce
alternatives.key_difference: Klaviyo is purpose-built for e-commerce with native Shopify and WooCommerce integrations, predictive analytics, and review management that Campaign Monitor lacks. If your business relies on e-commerce, Klaviyo's specialized features and platform integrations make it the clear winner.

alternatives.name: Mailchimp
alternatives.key_difference: Mailchimp offers a completely free tier with up to 500 subscribers and includes landing pages, A/B testing, and basic automation at no cost. For small businesses just starting out or testing email marketing before investing, Mailchimp's free plan and lower entry price ($13/month) beat Campaign Monitor's paid-only model.

faq.q: What is the best free alternative to Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: Brevo stands out with a generous free tier supporting up to 100,000 subscribers, making it the best no-cost option for email marketing. If you need less than 2,500 subscribers, Beehiiv also offers an excellent free plan with newsletter-specific features. Both platforms let you test core functionality before upgrading to paid plans.

faq.q: What is the best Campaign Monitor alternative for small business?
faq.a: MailerLite is the top choice for small businesses, offering the lowest paid entry point at $9/month combined with a free tier for 1,000 subscribers. It includes automation, landing pages, and pop-ups—all the essentials for growing a small business email list without the premium pricing of Campaign Monitor.

faq.q: Is there a cheaper alternative to Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: Yes, several alternatives cost less than Campaign Monitor's $11/month starting price. MailerLite starts at $9/month, while Mailchimp, ConvertKit, Brevo, and GetResponse all offer free tiers that let you start for $0 before upgrading. If you want free forever, Brevo's free plan with 100,000 subscribers is unmatched.
